feed.title: grace.hylandd
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from grace.hylandd

entry.title: I’ve always though Vanessa from the little mermaid was honestly the most cvnt disney villain! If I was Ursula I would’ve stayed like that forever!!!
entry.content: I’ve always though Vanessa from the little mermaid was honestly the most cvnt disney villain! If I was Ursula I would’ve stayed like that forever!!!

entry.title: Dont throw stones at glass houses
entry.content: Dont throw stones at glass houses

entry.title: Cotton on for those who wanna know
entry.content: Cotton on for those who wanna know

entry.title: You don’t haunt me anymore. When I was 14 I had my first picture day as Grace. A heard of 50 boys were all watching me pointing, laughing and saying horrible things. Whenever I passed them in school I would always go into fight or flight. I now pass some
entry.content: You don’t haunt me anymore. When I was 14 I had my first picture day as Grace. A heard of 50 boys were all watching me pointing, laughing and saying horrible things. Whenever I passed them in school I would always go into fight or flight. I now pass some

entry.title: As a trans girl I have been in relationships and situationships where I was not treated like the Queen that I know I am. This is because I had a scarcity mindset when it came to men. I used to cling onto the first man that was giving me attention regardle
entry.content: As a trans girl I have been in relationships and situationships where I was not treated like the Queen that I know I am. This is because I had a scarcity mindset when it came to men. I used to cling onto the first man that was giving me attention regardle

entry.title: I also lost an ipad that had subscriptions on it!
entry.content: I also lost an ipad that had subscriptions on it!
